description: Configure React Router in App.jsx with Navbar navigation and two pages (Home and HelloWorld)

userStories.title: Add React Router imports to App.jsx
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to import Router, Routes, and Route from react-router-dom to enable routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Import BrowserRouter as Router from 'react-router-dom'
Import Routes from 'react-router-dom'
Import Route from 'react-router-dom'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Import Navbar and page components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to import the Navbar component and page components.
acceptanceCriteria: Import Navbar from './components/Navbar'
Import Home from './pages/Home'
Import HelloWorld from './pages/HelloWorld'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create container and content style objects
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define CSS-in-JS style objects for the app layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Define containerStyle with display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', height: '100vh'
Define contentStyle with flex: 1, display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement App component with Router and layouts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to replace the App function with Router-based layout structure.
acceptanceCriteria: App returns JSX wrapped in Router component
Router contains a div with containerStyle applied
Navbar component is rendered inside the container
main element with contentStyle contains Routes component
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Home and HelloWorld routes
userStories.description: As a user, I need to navigate between Home and HelloWorld pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Route with path='/' renders Home component
Route with path='/hello' renders HelloWorld component
Routes component contains both Route definitions
Default export of App remains in place
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
